holdings.infoBox: ENZL is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fisher & Paykel Healthcare Corporation stock at 20.93%, Auckland International Airport at 13.24%, Infratil at 12.02%, Contact Energy at 4.30%, and Meridian Energy at 4.26%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI New Zealand ETF (ENZL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks the performance of a market-cap-weighted index of the top 25 equity securities in the New Zealand equity market, selected by market-cap. ENZL was launched on Sep 1, 2010 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI New Zealand All Cap Top 25 Capped Index

data.title: New Zealand First-Quarter Inflation Higher Than Expected
data.text: New Zealand's inflation rate came in higher than expected in the first quarter, underscoring concerns about the emergence of price pressures across the economy just as the Middle East energy shock was...

data.title: RBNZ Signals Rate Hikes Possible If Inflation Threats Linger
data.text: The Reserve Bank of New Zealand has indicated it could raise interest rates if the surge in oil prices related to the Iran war drags on, threatening a sustained rise in inflation.

data.title: RBNZ Leaves Interest Rates on Hold, Expects Inflation to Soften
data.text: The Reserve Bank of New Zealand left interest rates unchanged at its monetary policy meeting and said it expected inflation to retreat soon and for economic recovery to gather pace in the year ahead.

data.title: The Rugby World Cup starts this week. But who would be the investment winners?
data.text: The Rugby Union World Cup starts in France on September 8. Prepare for several weeks of sweaty scrums, rambunctious rucks and muscular mauls.
